title: HighLevel V2 API authorization fails with 400 error
symptom: When attempting to connect the HighLevel V2 node in n8n, a 400 error occurs, preventing further progress.
applies_when: Correct client key and secret key provided
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node or integration
root_cause: The 400 error typically indicates a bad request, which can occur due to improperly formatted scopes or incorrect API endpoint details. Even minor issues like extra spaces in scope definitions can lead to this error.
fix_steps: Open the HighLevel V2 node settings
Manually retype the scopes without any extra spaces
agent_instruction: Manually retype the scopes in the HighLevel V2 node settings and save the changes.
